```{r, fig.width=8, fig.height=10}
stat_test <- DN_KO_rel_16 %>%
  group_by(`function`) %>%
  wilcox_test(RelAbund ~ SampleType) %>%
  adjust_pvalue(method = "bonferroni") %>%
  add_xy_position(x = "SampleType")

stat_test <- stat_test %>% filter(p.adj < 0.05)

stat_test <- stat_test |>
  mutate(y.position = 0.00028)

stat_test$symbol <- "***"

# legend plot
legend_plot <- ggplot(legend_df, aes(x = 1, y = Step, fill = Step)) +
  geom_tile(color = "black", width = 0.4, height = 0.9) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = reduction_colors,
    labels = reduction_labels,
    name = "Denitrification Step"
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 13),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.8, "cm")
  )

legend_grob <- cowplot::get_legend(legend_plot)

# plot -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
fig5 <- DN_KO_rel_16 |>
  ggplot(aes(x = SampleType, y = RelAbund, fill = SampleType)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap2(~ `function`, 
             labeller = as_labeller(KO_strip_text_labs),
             strip = strip) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
 #   title = "Rel Abund of denitrification KO - 16HRT",
    x = "Sample Type",
    y = "Relative Abundance"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(CC = "#ffa52d", WC = "darkseagreen"), name = "Media Type") +
  stat_pvalue_manual(
    stat_test,
    label = "symbol",
    tip.length = 0.01,
    hide.ns = TRUE # or FALSE to show all
  ) +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 15),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 15)
  )

# plot w/ extra legend
fig5_final <- fig5 + patchwork::wrap_elements(legend_grob) +
  plot_layout(ncol = 2, widths = c(10, 3))

#ggsave("../raw_figs_301/dnbr_fig5_picrust2.png", plot = fig5_final, width = 9, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 300)

ggsave("../present_figs/fig5_picrust2.png", plot = fig5_final, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

*NSTI plot - extra - not saved*
```{r}
nsti_317 <- read_tsv("../data/picrust2/marker_predicted_and_nsti_317.tsv")

# 317 bar plot
nsti_317 |>
  ggplot(aes(x = sequence, y = metadata_NSTI)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title = "NSTI Scores of 317 se-ASVs", x = "Each bar = Unique se-ASV (317)", y = "NSTI score") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0.5, 1, 2), labels = c("good (0.5)", "moderate (1)", "bad (2)")) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank()) +
  geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 0.5), color = "#808080", linetype = "dashed", size = 0.75) +
  geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 1), color = "#808080", linetype = "dashed", size = 0.75) +
  geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 2), color = "#cc3700", linetype = "dashed", size = 0.75) 
```

*Figure S6 A - 4-h HRT*
```{r, fig.width=8, fig.height=10}
# stats
stat_test <- DN_KO_rel_4 %>%
  group_by(`function`) %>%
  wilcox_test(RelAbund ~ SampleType) %>%
  adjust_pvalue(method = "bonferroni") %>%
  add_xy_position(x = "SampleType")

stat_test <- stat_test %>% filter(p.adj < 0.05)

stat_test <- stat_test |>
  mutate(y.position = 0.00028)

stat_test$symbol <- "***"

# legend plot
legend_plot <- ggplot(legend_df, aes(x = 1, y = Step, fill = Step)) +
  geom_tile(color = "black", width = 0.4, height = 0.9) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = reduction_colors,
    labels = reduction_labels,
    name = "Denitrification Step"
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 13),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.8, "cm")
  )

legend_grob <- cowplot::get_legend(legend_plot)

# plot
sfig6a <- DN_KO_rel_4 |>
  ggplot(aes(x = SampleType, y = RelAbund, fill = SampleType)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap2(~ `function`, 
             labeller = as_labeller(KO_strip_text_labs),
             strip = strip) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    title = "4-h HRT",
    x = "Media Type",
    y = "Relative Abundance"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(CC = "#ffa52d", WC = "darkseagreen"), name = "Media Type") +
  stat_pvalue_manual(
    stat_test,
    label = "symbol",
    tip.length = 0.01,
    hide.ns = TRUE # or FALSE to show all
  ) +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 15),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    title = element_text(size = 15)
  )
```

*Figure S6 B - 8-h HRT*
```{r, fig.width=6, fig.height=10}
# stats
stat_test <- DN_KO_rel_8 %>%
  group_by(`function`) %>%
  wilcox_test(RelAbund ~ SampleType) %>%
  adjust_pvalue(method = "bonferroni") %>%
  add_xy_position(x = "SampleType")

stat_test <- stat_test %>% filter(p.adj < 0.05)

stat_test <- stat_test |>
  mutate(y.position = 0.00028)

stat_test$symbol <- "***"

# legend plot
legend_plot <- ggplot(legend_df, aes(x = 1, y = Step, fill = Step)) +
  geom_tile(color = "black", width = 0.4, height = 0.9) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = reduction_colors,
    labels = reduction_labels,
    name = "Denitrification Step"
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 13),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.8, "cm")
  )

legend_grob <- cowplot::get_legend(legend_plot)

# plot
sfig6b <- DN_KO_rel_8 |>
  ggplot(aes(x = SampleType, y = RelAbund, fill = SampleType)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap2(~ `function`, 
             labeller = as_labeller(KO_strip_text_labs),
             strip = strip) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    title = "8-h HRT",
    x = "Media Type",
    y = "Relative Abundance"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(CC = "#ffa52d", WC = "darkseagreen"), name = "Media Type") +
  stat_pvalue_manual(
    stat_test,
    label = "symbol",
    tip.length = 0.01,
    hide.ns = TRUE # or FALSE to show all
  ) +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 15),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    title = element_text(size = 15)
  )
```

*FINAL SUPP: Figure S6*
```{r, fig.width=14, fig.height=8}
sfig6 <- sfig6a + plot_spacer() + sfig6b + plot_spacer() + patchwork::wrap_elements(legend_grob) +
  plot_layout(ncol = 5, widths = c(5, 0.1, 5, 0.1, 2))

sfig6

#ggsave("../raw_figs_301/dnbr_sfig6_48_picrust2.png", plot = sfig6, width = 14, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)
#ggsave("../present_figs/dnbr_sfig6_48_picrust2.png", plot = sfig6, width = 14, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

*################################################################################################################*
*################################################################################################################*
#-----------------------------------------
### 7) Alpha Diversity - (FigS3, Table S2)
# Media samples only, all HRTs
#-----------------------------------------

*Prep*
```{r}
# calculate alpha diversity
alpha_df <- estimate_richness(ps_media, measures = c("Shannon", "Chao1", "Simpson"))
alpha_df$SampleID <- rownames(alpha_df)
alpha_df$SampleID <- sub("^X", "", alpha_df$SampleID)

# add sample info
alpha_df$SampleType <- sapply(alpha_df$SampleID, extract_sample_type)
alpha_df$Bioreactor <- sapply(alpha_df$SampleID, extract_bioreactor_id)
alpha_df$HRT <- sapply(alpha_df$SampleID, extract_HRT)
alpha_df$SampleSource <- sapply(alpha_df$SampleID, extract_sample_source)

# converting cols to factors
columns_to_factor <- c("SampleType", "HRT", "SampleSource", "Bioreactor")

alpha_df <- alpha_df |>
  mutate_at(vars(all_of(columns_to_factor)), ~ as.factor(as.character(.)))

## ordering HRT
HRT_order <- c("4", "8", "16")

alpha_df <- alpha_df |>
  mutate(HRT = factor(HRT, levels = HRT_order))

# numeric means - alpha diversity by sample type & HRT
alpha_df |>
  group_by(SampleType, HRT) |>
  summarise(mean_shannon = mean(Shannon, na.rm = TRUE),
            shan_std = sd(Shannon, na.rm = TRUE),
            mean_chao = mean(Chao1, na.rm = TRUE),
            chao_std = sd(Chao1, na.rm = TRUE),
            mean_simpson = mean(Simpson, na.rm = TRUE),
            simpson_std = sd(Simpson, na.rm = TRUE))
```

*Figure S3 A-C & Stats*
```{r, fig.width=4, fig.height=6}
#----------------
# Plot - Shannon
#----------------
sfig3a <- alpha_df |>
ggplot(aes(x = Bioreactor, y = Shannon)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = SampleType)) +
#  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, size = 2, alpha = 0.4, aes(shape = SampleSource)) +
  facet_wrap(~ HRT) +
  labs(
#    title = "Shannon Diversity of CC and WC bioreactors",
    x = "Bioreactor", 
    y = "Shannon Index") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    labels = c("corncob" = "CC", "woodchip" = "WC"),
    values = c("corncob" = "#ffa52d", "woodchip" = "darkseagreen"),
    name = "Media Type") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("media" = 5, "water" = 16)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        strip.text = element_text(size = 13),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 13), 
        axis.title = element_text(size = 13),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 13)) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("corncob" = "CC", 
                              "woodchip" = "WC"))

#----------------
# Plot - Chao1
#----------------
sfig3b <- alpha_df |>
ggplot(aes(x = Bioreactor, y = Chao1)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = SampleType)) +
#  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, size = 2, alpha = 0.4, aes(shape = SampleSource)) +
  facet_wrap(~ HRT) +
  labs(
#    title = "Chao1 Diversity of CC and WC bioreactors",
    x = "Bioreactor", 
    y = "Chao1 Index") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    labels = c("corncob" = "CC", "woodchip" = "WC"),
    values = c("corncob" = "#ffa52d", "woodchip" = "darkseagreen"),
    name = "Media Type") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("media" = 5, "water" = 16)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        strip.text = element_text(size = 13),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 13), 
        axis.title = element_text(size = 13),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 13)) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("corncob" = "CC", 
                              "woodchip" = "WC"))

#----------------
# Plot - Simpson
#----------------
sfig3c <- alpha_df |>
ggplot(aes(x = Bioreactor, y = Simpson)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = SampleType)) +
#  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, size = 2, alpha = 0.4, aes(shape = SampleSource)) +
  facet_wrap(~ HRT) +
  labs(
#    title = "Simpson Diversity of CC and WC bioreactors",
    x = "Bioreactor", 
    y = "Simpson Index") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    labels = c("corncob" = "CC", "woodchip" = "WC"),
    values = c("corncob" = "#ffa52d", "woodchip" = "darkseagreen"),
    name = "Media Type") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("media" = 5, "water" = 16)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        strip.text = element_text(size = 13),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 13), 
        axis.title = element_text(size = 13),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 13)) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("corncob" = "CC", 
                              "woodchip" = "WC"))
```
```{r}
#-----------------
# Stats - Shannon 
#-----------------
alpha_df |>
  group_by(HRT) |>
  kruskal_test(Shannon ~ SampleType)

# Post Hoc 
dunn_alpha_shan <- alpha_df |>
  group_by(HRT) |>
  dunn_test(Shannon ~ Bioreactor, p.adjust.method = "bonferroni")

dunn_alpha_shan_sig <- dunn_alpha_shan |>
  filter(p.adj.signif != "ns")

#-----------------
# Stats - Chao1 
#-----------------
alpha_df |>
  group_by(HRT) |>
  kruskal_test(Chao1 ~ SampleType) 

# Post Hoc 
dunn_alpha_chao <- alpha_df |>
  group_by(HRT) |>
  dunn_test(Chao1 ~ Bioreactor, p.adjust.method = "bonferroni")

dunn_alpha_chao_sig <- dunn_alpha_chao |>
  filter(p.adj.signif != "ns")

#-----------------
# Stats - Simpson 
#-----------------

# Stats for sample type 
alpha_df |>
  group_by(HRT) |>
  kruskal_test(Simpson ~ SampleType) 

# Post Hoc 
dunn_alpha_simpson <- alpha_df |>
  group_by(HRT) |>
  dunn_test(Simpson ~ Bioreactor, p.adjust.method = "bonferroni")

dunn_alpha_simpson_sig <- dunn_alpha_simpson |>
  filter(p.adj.signif != "ns")
```

*Presentation fig?*
```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=6}
#----------------
# Plot - Shannon
#----------------
pfig3a <- alpha_df |>
ggplot(aes(x = HRT, y = Shannon)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = SampleType)) +
#  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, size = 2, alpha = 0.4, aes(shape = SampleSource)) +
  facet_wrap(~ SampleType) +
  labs(
#    title = "Shannon Diversity of CC and WC bioreactors",
    x = "HRT", 
    y = "Shannon Index") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    labels = c("corncob" = "CC", "woodchip" = "WC"),
    values = c("corncob" = "#ffa52d", "woodchip" = "darkseagreen"),
    name = "Media Type") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("media" = 5, "water" = 16)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        strip.text = element_text(size = 13),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 13), 
        axis.title = element_text(size = 13),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 13)) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("corncob" = "CC", 
                              "woodchip" = "WC"))

#----------------
# Plot - Chao1
#----------------
pfig3b <- alpha_df |>
ggplot(aes(x = HRT, y = Chao1)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = SampleType)) +
#  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, size = 2, alpha = 0.4, aes(shape = SampleSource)) +
  facet_wrap(~ SampleType) +
  labs(
#    title = "Chao1 Diversity of CC and WC bioreactors",
    x = "HRT", 
    y = "Chao1 Index") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    labels = c("corncob" = "CC", "woodchip" = "WC"),
    values = c("corncob" = "#ffa52d", "woodchip" = "darkseagreen"),
    name = "Media Type") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("media" = 5, "water" = 16)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        strip.text = element_text(size = 13),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 13), 
        axis.title = element_text(size = 13),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 13)) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("corncob" = "CC", 
                              "woodchip" = "WC"))


pfig3 <- pfig3a + plot_spacer() + pfig3b +
  plot_layout(widths = c(2, 0.1, 2), ncol = 3) 

# save plot
#ggsave("../present_figs/sfig3_alpha.png", plot = pfig3, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 300)

#-----------------
# Stats - Shannon 
#-----------------


# Post Hoc 


#-----------------
# Stats - Chao1 
#-----------------


```


*FINAL SUPP: Figure S3*
```{r, fig.width=30, fig.height=10}}
sfig3 <- sfig3a + plot_spacer() + sfig3b + plot_spacer() + sfig3c +
  plot_layout(widths = c(2, 0.1, 2, 0.1, 2), ncol = 5) 

# save plot
#ggsave("../raw_figs_301/dnbr_sfig3_alpha.png", plot = sfig3, width = 10, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

*Rarefied Analysis - media only - not saved*
```{r}
# calculate alpha diversity - ps_m_rare in 2) NMDS rarefied analysis section
alpha_df <- estimate_richness(ps_m_rare, measures = c("Shannon", "Chao1", "Simpson"))
alpha_df$SampleID <- rownames(alpha_df)
alpha_df$SampleID <- sub("^X", "", alpha_df$SampleID)

# add sample info
alpha_df$SampleType <- sapply(alpha_df$SampleID, extract_sample_type)
alpha_df$Bioreactor <- sapply(alpha_df$SampleID, extract_bioreactor_id)
alpha_df$HRT <- sapply(alpha_df$SampleID, extract_HRT)
alpha_df$SampleSource <- sapply(alpha_df$SampleID, extract_sample_source)

# converting cols to factors
columns_to_factor <- c("SampleType", "HRT", "SampleSource", "Bioreactor")

alpha_df <- alpha_df |>
  mutate_at(vars(all_of(columns_to_factor)), ~ as.factor(as.character(.)))

## ordering HRT
HRT_order <- c("4", "8", "16")

alpha_df <- alpha_df |>
  mutate(HRT = factor(HRT, levels = HRT_order))
```
```{r, fig.width=4, fig.height=6}
#----------------
# Plot - Shannon
#----------------
alpha_df |>
ggplot(aes(x = Bioreactor, y = Shannon)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = SampleType)) +
#  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, size = 2, alpha = 0.4, aes(shape = SampleSource)) +
  facet_wrap(~ HRT) +
  labs(
#    title = "Shannon Diversity of CC and WC bioreactors",
    x = "Bioreactor", 
    y = "Shannon Index") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("corncob" = "#ffa52d", "woodchip" = "darkseagreen"),
    name = "Sample Type") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("media" = 5, "water" = 16)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        strip.text = element_text(size = 15),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 15), 
        axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 15))

#----------------
# Plot - Chao1
#----------------
alpha_df |>
ggplot(aes(x = Bioreactor, y = Chao1)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = SampleType)) +
#  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, size = 2, alpha = 0.4, aes(shape = SampleSource)) +
  facet_wrap(~ HRT) +
  labs(
#    title = "Chao1 Diversity of CC and WC bioreactors",
    x = "Bioreactor", 
    y = "Chao1 Index") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("corncob" = "#ffa52d", "woodchip" = "darkseagreen"),
    name = "Sample Type") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("media" = 5, "water" = 16)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        strip.text = element_text(size = 15),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 15), 
        axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 15))

#----------------
# Plot - Simpson
#----------------
alpha_df |>
ggplot(aes(x = Bioreactor, y = Simpson)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = SampleType)) +
#  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, size = 2, alpha = 0.4, aes(shape = SampleSource)) +
  facet_wrap(~ HRT) +
  labs(
#    title = "Simpson Diversity of CC and WC bioreactors",
    x = "Bioreactor", 
    y = "Simpson Index") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("corncob" = "#ffa52d", "woodchip" = "darkseagreen"),
    name = "Sample Type") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("media" = 5, "water" = 16)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        strip.text = element_text(size = 15),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 15), 
        axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 15))
```

*################################################################################################################*
*################################################################################################################*
#-------------------------------
### 8) TOC
# Media samples only, all HRTs
#-------------------------------

*TOC boxplots & means & stats*
```{r, fig.width=7, fig.height=6}

# ----------- REMOVING OUTLIERS -----------

nre_data$SampleID <- ifelse(
  nre_data$HRT == 4,
  paste0("4", paste(nre_data$sample_type, nre_data$bioreactor_ID, nre_data$influent_id, sep = "_")),
  paste(nre_data$sample_type, nre_data$bioreactor_ID, nre_data$influent_id, sep = "_")
)

nre_data_removed_outliers <- nre_data |>
  filter(!SampleID %in% c("CC_1_28", "CC_2_28", "CC_3_28", "WC_4_7"))

#------------------------------------------------
# Plot - TOC comparison by bioreactor rep (1-6)
#------------------------------------------------
toc_br <- nre_data_removed_outliers |>
  ggplot(aes(bioreactor_ID, TOC_conc, fill = sample_type)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap(~HRT) +
  labs(
    x = "Bioreactor ID",
    y = "TOC (mg C/L)"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("CC" = "#ffa52d", "WC" = "darkseagreen"),
    name = "Media Type") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 110)) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        strip.text = element_text(size = 15),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey85"),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 13),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 13),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 13))

#-------------------------------------------------
# Plot - TOC comparison by sample type (CC vs WC)
#-------------------------------------------------
toc_st <- nre_data_removed_outliers |>
  ggplot(aes(sample_type, TOC_conc, fill = sample_type)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap(~HRT) +
  labs(
    x = "Media Type",
    y = "TOC (mg C/L)"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("CC" = "#ffa52d", "WC" = "darkseagreen"),
    name = "Media Type") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 110)) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        strip.text = element_text(size = 15),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey85"),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 13),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 13),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 13))

# numeric means
toc_means_df <- nre_data |>
  group_by(sample_type, HRT) |>
  summarise(mean_conc= mean(TOC_conc, na.rm = TRUE),
            std = sd(TOC_conc, na.rm = TRUE))

#-------------------------------------------------
# Plot - TOC comparison by sample type (CC vs WC)
#-------------------------------------------------
toc_st_facet <- nre_data_removed_outliers |>
  ggplot(aes(HRT, TOC_conc, fill = sample_type)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap(~sample_type) +
  labs(
    x = "Media Type",
    y = "TOC (mg C/L)"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("CC" = "#ffa52d", "WC" = "darkseagreen"),
    name = "Media Type") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 110)) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        strip.text = element_text(size = 15),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey85"),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 13),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 13),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 13))

# full model comparison [KRUSKAL] - p < 0.05 = signif diff in TOC between HRT (CC & WC: p < 0.05 by a lot (e-16))
nre_data_removed_outliers |>
  group_by(sample_type) |>
  kruskal_test(TOC_conc ~ HRT) 

# pairwise comparison [DUNN] 
toc_dunn_st <- nre_data_removed_outliers |>
  group_by(sample_type) |>
  dunn_test(TOC_conc ~ HRT, p.adjust.method = "bonferroni")

toc_dunn_st_sig <- nre_dunn_br |>
  filter(p.adj.signif != "ns")

#------------------------------------
# Stats - NRE separated by CC vs WC
#------------------------------------

# full model comparison [KRUSKAL] - p < 0.05 = signif diff in removal efficiency between sample type
nre_data_removed_outliers |>
  group_by(HRT) |>
  kruskal_test(TOC_conc ~ sample_type)

#------------------------------------------------
# Stats - NRE separated by bioreactor rep (1-6)
#------------------------------------------------
# pairwise comparison [DUNN]
nre_dunn_ST <- nre_data_removed_outliers |>
  group_by(HRT) |>
  dunn_test(removal_efficiency ~ bioreactor_ID, p.adjust.method = "bonferroni")

nre_dunn_ST_sig <- nre_dunn_ST |>
  filter(p.adj.signif != "ns")

```

*TOC & NRE correlation*
```{r, fig.width=15, fig.height=8}

# calculating Spearman's correlation - ALL DATA
toc_nre_corr_stats <- nre_data |>
  group_by(HRT, sample_type) |>
  dplyr::summarize(
    rho = cor(TOC_conc, removal_efficiency, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs"),
    p   = cor.test(TOC_conc, removal_efficiency, method = "spearman")$p.value,
    .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(
     sig = case_when(
      p < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p < 0.01 ~ "**",
      p < 0.05 ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ ""
  ))

#--------------------------------------------------
# Plot - TOC vs NRE in HRT for CC & WC - ALL DATA
#--------------------------------------------------
toc_nre_corr_p <- nre_data |>
  ggplot(aes(x = TOC_conc, y = removal_efficiency, group = sample_type, colour = sample_type)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_smooth(aes(group = sample_type), method = "lm", se = FALSE, linetype = "dashed") +
  stat_cor(method = "spearman", 
           aes(label = paste(factor(..group.., labels = c("CC", "WC")), ": ", ..r.label.., ..p.label.., sep = " ")),
           output.type = "text",
           label.x.npc = 0.4, label.y.npc = 0.3,
           size = 5, 
           color = "black") +
  labs(
    x = "Total organic carbon (mg C/L)",
    y = "Nitrate Removal Efficiency (%)",
    color = "Media Type"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  facet_wrap(~ HRT, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("CC" = "#ffa52d", "WC" = "darkseagreen"),
    name = "Media Type"
  ) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        axis.text = element_text(size = 20), 
        axis.title = element_text(size = 20),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 20),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 20),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 20),
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10)))

# ----------- REMOVING OUTLIERS -----------

nre_data$SampleID <- ifelse(
  nre_data$HRT == 4,
  paste0("4", paste(nre_data$sample_type, nre_data$bioreactor_ID, nre_data$influent_id, sep = "_")),
  paste(nre_data$sample_type, nre_data$bioreactor_ID, nre_data$influent_id, sep = "_")
)

# calculating Spearman's correlation - ALL DATA
nre_data_removed_outliers <- nre_data |>
  filter(!SampleID %in% c("CC_1_28", "CC_2_28", "CC_3_28", "WC_4_7"))

toc_nre_corr_stats_RO <- nre_data_removed_outliers |>
  group_by(HRT, sample_type) |>
  dplyr::summarize(
    rho = cor(TOC_conc, removal_efficiency, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs"),
    p   = cor.test(TOC_conc, removal_efficiency, method = "spearman")$p.value,
    .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(
     sig = case_when(
      p < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p < 0.01 ~ "**",
      p < 0.05 ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ ""
  ))

#---------------------------------------------------------
# Plot - TOC vs NRE in HRT for CC & WC - REMOVED OUTLIERS
#---------------------------------------------------------
toc_nre_corr_RO_p <- nre_data_removed_outliers |>
  ggplot(aes(x = TOC_conc, y = removal_efficiency, group = sample_type, colour = sample_type)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_smooth(aes(group = sample_type), method = "lm", se = FALSE, linetype = "dashed") +
  stat_cor(method = "spearman", 
           aes(label = paste(factor(..group.., labels = c("CC", "WC")), ": ", ..r.label.., ..p.label.., sep = " ")),
           output.type = "text",
           label.x.npc = 0.4, label.y.npc = 0.3,
           size = 5, 
           color = "black") +
  labs(
    x = "Total organic carbon (mg C/L)",
    y = "Nitrate Removal Efficiency (%)",
    color = "Media Type"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  facet_wrap(~ HRT, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("CC" = "#ffa52d", "WC" = "darkseagreen"),
    name = "Media Type"
  ) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        axis.text = element_text(size = 20), 
        axis.title = element_text(size = 20),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 20),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 20),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 20),
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10)))

#---------------------------------------------------------
# Plot - TOC vs NRE in HRT for CC & WC - REMOVED OUTLIERS
#---------------------------------------------------------
toc_nre_corr_RO_allHRT_p <- nre_data_removed_outliers |>
  ggplot(aes(x = TOC_conc, y = removal_efficiency, group = sample_type, colour = sample_type)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_smooth(aes(group = sample_type), method = "lm", se = FALSE, linetype = "dashed") +
  stat_cor(method = "spearman", 
           aes(label = paste(factor(..group.., labels = c("CC", "WC")), ": ", ..r.label.., ..p.label.., sep = " ")),
           output.type = "text",
           label.x.npc = 0.4, label.y.npc = 0.3,
           size = 5, 
           color = "black") +
  labs(
    x = "Total organic carbon (mg C/L)",
    y = "Nitrate Removal Efficiency (%)",
    color = "Media Type"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
#  facet_wrap(~ HRT, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("CC" = "#ffa52d", "WC" = "darkseagreen"),
    name = "Media Type"
  ) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        axis.text = element_text(size = 20), 
        axis.title = element_text(size = 20),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 20),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 20),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 20),
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10)))
```

*TOC & se-ASVs* <- Must have objects from 5) Correlation section read in
```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=8}
# plot - 71 CC se-ASVs & TOC -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CC_71_corr_toc <- nre_CC_pso_df |>
  ggplot(aes(x = TOC_conc, y = SumTaxa, shape = HRT, colour = SampleType)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  stat_cor(method = "spearman", 
           aes(label = paste0("rho = ", ..r.., ", p = ", formatC(..p.., format = "e", digits = 2)), group = 1),
           output.type = "text",
           label.x.npc = 0.5, label.y.npc = 0.4,
           size = 5, 
           color = "black") +
  labs(
    x = "Total Organic Carbon (mg C/L)",
    y = "Relative Abundance of CC se-ASVs (71)",
    color = "Sample Type",
#    title = "CC se-ASVs only"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("CC" = "black"), name = "Media Type"
  ) + 
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c(
      "4" = 18, 
      "8" = 17,
      "16" = 16
    )
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        axis.text = element_text(size = 20), 
        axis.title = element_text(size = 20),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 20),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 20),
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10)))

# checking small p-value <- p = 2.2e-16, rho = 0.8637639 
cor.test(
  nre_CC_pso_df$TOC_conc,
  nre_CC_pso_df$SumTaxa,
  method = "spearman",
  exact  = FALSE   
)

# plot - 246 WC se-ASVs & TOC -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
WC_246_corr_toc <- nre_WC_pso_df |>
  ggplot(aes(x = TOC_conc, y = SumTaxa, shape = HRT, colour = SampleType)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  stat_cor(method = "spearman", 
           aes(label = paste0("rho = ", ..r.., ", p = ", formatC(..p.., format = "e", digits = 2)), group = 1),
           output.type = "text",
           label.x.npc = 0.5, label.y.npc = 0.4,
           size = 5, 
           color = "black") +
  labs(
    x = "Total Organic Carbon (mg C/L)",
    y = "Relative Abundance of WC se-ASVs (246)",
    color = "Sample Type",
#    title = "WC se-ASVs only"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("WC" = "black"), name = "Media Type"
  ) + 
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c(
      "4" = 18, 
      "8" = 17,
      "16" = 16
    )
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        axis.text = element_text(size = 20), 
        axis.title = element_text(size = 20),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 20),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 20),
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10)))


# checking small p-value <- p = 1.657e-05, rho = 0.5837188 
cor.test(
  nre_WC_pso_df$TOC_conc,
  nre_WC_pso_df$SumTaxa,
  method = "spearman",
  exact  = FALSE  
)

CC_71_corr_toc + plot_spacer() + WC_246_corr_toc + 
  plot_layout(widths = c(2, 0.1, 2), ncol = 3) 
```

*################################################################################################################*
*################################################################################################################*
#-------------------------------------------
### 9) Taxonomy 
# 317 se-ASVs, media samples only, all HRTs
#-------------------------------------------

#---------------- BAR ----------------

*CC - se-asv Phyla by Bioreactor*
```{r}
ps_media_CC <- subset_samples(ps_media, SampleType == "corncob")

#---------------------------------------------------
# Calculating relative abundance HRT and Bioreactor
#---------------------------------------------------
ps_media_CC_rel_df <- ps_media_CC |>
  psmelt() |>
  as_tibble() |>
  filter(!is.na(Phylum), Phylum != "NA") |>
  group_by(Bioreactor, HRT) |>
  mutate(relative_abund = Abundance / sum(Abundance, na.rm = TRUE)) |> 
  ungroup()

# assigning core vs other grouping for phyla coloring
ps_media_CC_rel_df$Phylum_ID <- ifelse(ps_media_CC_rel_df$OTU %in% CC_71_se_asvs, as.character(ps_media_CC_rel_df$Phylum), "Other") 

# # check
# check_df <- ps_media_CC_rel_df |>
#   filter(OTU %in% CC_71_se_asvs)

# ordering Phyla
unique(ps_media_CC_rel_df$Phylum_ID)

se_asv_phylum_map <- c(
  "Proteobacteria" = "#1F77B4", 
  "Actinobacteriota" = "#2CA02C",
  "Cyanobacteria" = "#9467BD",
  "Euryarchaeota" = "#8C564B",
  "Bacteroidota" = "#393B79",
  "Acidobacteriota" = "#637939",
  "Desulfobacterota" = "#7B4173",
  "Planctomycetota" = "#AD494A",
  "Myxococcota" = "#BEAED4",
  "Verrucomicrobiota" = "#A6CEE3",
  "Firmicutes" = "#B5CF6B",
  "Chloroflexi" = "#E7BA52",
  "Other" = "#999999"
)

# Phylum_ID to factor for ordering
ps_media_CC_rel_df$Phylum_ID <- factor(ps_media_CC_rel_df$Phylum_ID,
                                     levels = names(se_asv_phylum_map))
```
```{r, fig.height=8, fig.width=10}
# plot
cc_se_asv_phyla_br <- ggplot(ps_media_CC_rel_df, aes(x = Bioreactor, y = relative_abund, fill = Phylum_ID)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack", color = NA, na.rm = TRUE) +
  theme_bw() +
  facet_wrap(~HRT) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "CC se-ASV Phyla", values = se_asv_phylum_map) +
  labs(
    x = "Bioreactor", 
    y = "Relative Abundance"
  ) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 15), 
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 15), 
        strip.text = element_text(size = 15), 
        axis.title = element_text(size = 15))

#ggsave("../raw_figs_301/cc_se-asv_phyla_BR.png", plot = cc_se_asv_phyla_br, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

*CC - se-asv Phyla by HRT*
```{r}
#------------------------------------
# Calculating relative abundance HRT
#------------------------------------
ps_media_CC_rel_df <- ps_media_CC |>
  psmelt() |>
  as_tibble() |>
  filter(!is.na(Phylum), Phylum != "NA") |>
  group_by(HRT) |>
  mutate(relative_abund = Abundance / sum(Abundance, na.rm = TRUE)) |> 
  ungroup()

# assigning core vs other grouping for phyla coloring
ps_media_CC_rel_df$Phylum_ID <- ifelse(ps_media_CC_rel_df$OTU %in% CC_71_se_asvs, as.character(ps_media_CC_rel_df$Phylum), "Other") 

# # check
# check_df <- ps_media_CC_rel_df |>
#   filter(OTU %in% CC_71_se_asvs)

# ordering Phyla
unique(ps_media_CC_rel_df$Phylum_ID)

se_asv_phylum_map <- c(
  "Proteobacteria" = "#1F77B4", 
  "Actinobacteriota" = "#2CA02C",
  "Cyanobacteria" = "#9467BD",
  "Euryarchaeota" = "#8C564B",
  "Bacteroidota" = "#393B79",
  "Acidobacteriota" = "#637939",
  "Desulfobacterota" = "#7B4173",
  "Planctomycetota" = "#AD494A",
  "Myxococcota" = "#BEAED4",
  "Verrucomicrobiota" = "#A6CEE3",
  "Firmicutes" = "#B5CF6B",
  "Chloroflexi" = "#E7BA52",
  "Other" = "#999999"
)

# Phylum_ID to factor for ordering
ps_media_CC_rel_df$Phylum_ID <- factor(ps_media_CC_rel_df$Phylum_ID,
                                     levels = names(se_asv_phylum_map))
```
```{r, fig.height=8, fig.width=6}
# plot
cc_se_asv_phyla_br <- ggplot(ps_media_CC_rel_df, aes(x = HRT, y = relative_abund, fill = Phylum_ID)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack", color = NA, na.rm = TRUE) +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "CC se-ASV Phyla", values = se_asv_phylum_map) +
  labs(
    x = "HRT", 
    y = "Relative Abundance"
  ) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 15), 
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 15), 
        strip.text = element_text(size = 15), 
        axis.title = element_text(size = 15))

#ggsave("../raw_figs_301/cc_se-asv_phyla_HRT.png", plot = cc_se_asv_phyla_br, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

*WC - se-asv Phyla by Bioreactor*
```{r}
ps_media_WC <- subset_samples(ps_media, SampleType == "woodchip")

#---------------------------------------------------
# Calculating relative abundance HRT and Bioreactor
#---------------------------------------------------
ps_media_WC_rel_df <- ps_media_WC |>
  psmelt() |>
  as_tibble() |>
  filter(!is.na(Phylum), Phylum != "NA") |>
  group_by(Bioreactor, HRT) |>
  mutate(relative_abund = Abundance / sum(Abundance, na.rm = TRUE)) |> 
  ungroup()

# assigning core vs other grouping for phyla coloring
ps_media_WC_rel_df$Phylum_ID <- ifelse(ps_media_WC_rel_df$OTU %in% WC_246_se_asvs, as.character(ps_media_WC_rel_df$Phylum), "Other") 

# # check
# check_df <- ps_media_WC_rel_df |>
#   filter(OTU %in% WC_246_se_asvs)

# ordering Phyla
unique(ps_media_WC_rel_df$Phylum_ID)

se_asv_phylum_map <- c(
  "Proteobacteria" = "#1F77B4", 
  "Actinobacteriota" = "#2CA02C",
  "Cyanobacteria" = "#9467BD",
  "Bacteroidota" = "#393B79",
  "Acidobacteriota" = "#637939",
  "Desulfobacterota" = "#7B4173",
  "Planctomycetota" = "#AD494A",
  "Myxococcota" = "#BEAED4",
  "Verrucomicrobiota" = "#A6CEE3",
  "Firmicutes" = "#B5CF6B",
  "Chloroflexi" = "#E7BA52",
  "Halobacterota" = "#CEDB9C",
  "Thermoplasmatota" = "#CE6DBD",
  "Patescibacteria" = "#1B9E77",
  "Spirochaetota" = "#FF7F0E",
  "Armatimonadota" = "#17BECF",
  "Bdellovibrionota" = "#D62728",
  "Gemmatimonadota" = "#E6AB02",
  "Other" = "#999999"
)

# Phylum_ID to factor for ordering
ps_media_WC_rel_df$Phylum_ID <- factor(ps_media_WC_rel_df$Phylum_ID,
                                     levels = names(se_asv_phylum_map))
```
```{r, fig.height=8, fig.width=10}
# plot
WC_se_asv_phyla_br <- ggplot(ps_media_WC_rel_df, aes(x = Bioreactor, y = relative_abund, fill = Phylum_ID)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack", color = NA, na.rm = TRUE) +
  theme_bw() +
  facet_wrap(~HRT) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "WC se-ASV Phyla", values = se_asv_phylum_map) +
  labs(
    x = "Bioreactor", 
    y = "Relative Abundance"
  ) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 15), 
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 15), 
        strip.text = element_text(size = 15), 
        axis.title = element_text(size = 15))

#ggsave("../raw_figs_301/WC_se-asv_phyla_BR.png", plot = WC_se_asv_phyla_br, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

*WC - se-asv Phyla by HRT*
```{r}
#------------------------------------
# Calculating relative abundance HRT
#------------------------------------
ps_media_WC_rel_df <- ps_media_WC |>
  psmelt() |>
  as_tibble() |>
  filter(!is.na(Phylum), Phylum != "NA") |>
  group_by(HRT) |>
  mutate(relative_abund = Abundance / sum(Abundance, na.rm = TRUE)) |> 
  ungroup()

# assigning core vs other grouping for phyla coloring
ps_media_WC_rel_df$Phylum_ID <- ifelse(ps_media_WC_rel_df$OTU %in% WC_246_se_asvs, as.character(ps_media_WC_rel_df$Phylum), "Other") 

# # check
# check_df <- ps_media_WC_rel_df |>
#   filter(OTU %in% WC_246_se_asvs)

# ordering Phyla
unique(ps_media_WC_rel_df$Phylum_ID)

se_asv_phylum_map <- c(
  "Proteobacteria" = "#1F77B4", 
  "Actinobacteriota" = "#2CA02C",
  "Cyanobacteria" = "#9467BD",
  "Bacteroidota" = "#393B79",
  "Acidobacteriota" = "#637939",
  "Desulfobacterota" = "#7B4173",
  "Planctomycetota" = "#AD494A",
  "Myxococcota" = "#BEAED4",
  "Verrucomicrobiota" = "#A6CEE3",
  "Firmicutes" = "#B5CF6B",
  "Chloroflexi" = "#E7BA52",
  "Halobacterota" = "#CEDB9C",
  "Thermoplasmatota" = "#CE6DBD",
  "Patescibacteria" = "#1B9E77",
  "Spirochaetota" = "#FF7F0E",
  "Armatimonadota" = "#17BECF",
  "Bdellovibrionota" = "#D62728",
  "Gemmatimonadota" = "#E6AB02",
  "Other" = "#999999"
)

# Phylum_ID to factor for ordering
ps_media_WC_rel_df$Phylum_ID <- factor(ps_media_WC_rel_df$Phylum_ID,
                                     levels = names(se_asv_phylum_map))
```
```{r, fig.height=8, fig.width=6}
# plot
WC_se_asv_phyla_br <- ggplot(ps_media_WC_rel_df, aes(x = HRT, y = relative_abund, fill = Phylum_ID)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack", color = NA, na.rm = TRUE) +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "WC se-ASV Phyla", values = se_asv_phylum_map) +
  labs(
    x = "HRT", 
    y = "Relative Abundance"
  ) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 15), 
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 15), 
        strip.text = element_text(size = 15), 
        axis.title = element_text(size = 15))

#ggsave("../raw_figs_301/WC_se-asv_phyla_HRT.png", plot = WC_se_asv_phyla_br, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

*CC - se-asv Genera by Bioreactor*
```{r}
ps_media_CC <- subset_samples(ps_media, SampleType == "corncob")

#---------------------------------------------------
# Calculating relative abundance HRT and Bioreactor
#---------------------------------------------------
ps_media_CC_rel_df <- ps_media_CC |>
  psmelt() |>
  as_tibble() |>
  filter(!is.na(Genus), Genus != "NA") |>
  group_by(Bioreactor, HRT) |>
  mutate(relative_abund = Abundance / sum(Abundance, na.rm = TRUE)) |> 
  ungroup()

# assigning core vs other grouping for phyla coloring
ps_media_CC_rel_df$Genus_ID <- ifelse(ps_media_CC_rel_df$OTU %in% CC_71_se_asvs, as.character(ps_media_CC_rel_df$Genus), "Other") 

# # check
# check_df <- ps_media_CC_rel_df |>
#   filter(OTU %in% CC_71_se_asvs)

# ordering Phyla
unique(ps_media_CC_rel_df$Genus_ID)

se_asv_genus_cols <- colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(12, "Paired"))(50)
se_asv_genus_cols

se_asv_genus_map <- c(
  "Xanthobacter" = "#1F77B4", 
  "Pseudorhodoplanes" = "#2CA02C",
  "Azotobacter" = "#9467BD",
  "Burkholderia-Caballeronia-Paraburkholderia" = "#8C564B",
  "Cellulomonas" = "#393B79",
  "Azospira" = "#637939",
  "Zoogloea" = "#7B4173",
  "Pseudomonas" = "#AD494A",
  "Plot4-2H12" = "#BEAED4",
  "Methanobacterium" = "#A6CEE3",
  "Mycobacterium" = "#B5CF6B",
  "Bradyrhizobium" = "#E7BA52",
  "Nevskia" = "#1F77B4", 
  "Sphingomonas" = "#2CA02C",
  "Geothrix" = "#9467BD",
  "Desulfovibrio" = "#8C564B",
  "Mesorhizobium" = "#393B79",
  "Rhizomicrobium" = "#637939",
  "Caulobacter" = "#7B4173",
  "Pleomorphomonas" = "#AD494A",
  "Coxiella" = "#BEAED4",
  "Sediminibacterium" = "#A6CEE3",
  "Pajaroellobacter" = "#B5CF6B",
  "Undibacterium" = "#E7BA52",
  "Edaphobaculum" = "#1F77B4", 
  "Pseudolabrys" = "#2CA02C",
  "Kaistia" = "#9467BD",
  "Hyphomicrobium" = "#8C564B",
  "Rudaea" = "#393B79",
  "Devosia" = "#637939",
  "Aetherobacter" = "#7B4173",
  "Prosthecobacter" = "#AD494A",
  "Beijerinckia" = "#BEAED4",
  "Puia" = "#A6CEE3",
  "Novosphingobium" = "#B5CF6B",
  "Dyella" = "#E7BA52",
  "LD29" = "#1F77B4", 
  "Anaerolineaceae UCG-001" = "#2CA02C",
  "Bacteroides" = "#9467BD",
  "Papillibacter" = "#8C564B",
  "Sphingobium" = "#393B79",
  "Gluconacetobacter" = "#637939",
  "Tahibacter" = "#7B4173",
  "Gemmata" = "#AD494A",
  "Rhodopila" = "#BEAED4",
  "Ferruginibacter" = "#A6CEE3",
  "Thermincola" = "#B5CF6B",
  "WCHB1-32" = "#E7BA52",
  "Limnohabitans" = "#BEAED4",
  "Other" = "#999999"
)

# Genus_ID to factor for ordering
ps_media_CC_rel_df$Genus_ID <- factor(ps_media_CC_rel_df$Genus_ID,
                                     levels = names(se_asv_genus_map))
```
```{r, fig.height=8, fig.width=10}
# plot
cc_se_asv_genera_br <- ggplot(ps_media_CC_rel_df, aes(x = Bioreactor, y = relative_abund, fill = Genus_ID)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack", color = NA, na.rm = TRUE) +
  theme_bw() +
  facet_wrap(~HRT) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "CC se-ASV Phyla", values = se_asv_genus_map) +
  labs(
    x = "Bioreactor", 
    y = "Relative Abundance"
  ) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 15), 
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 15), 
        strip.text = element_text(size = 15), 
        axis.title = element_text(size = 15))

#ggsave("../raw_figs_301/cc_se-asv_genera_BR.png", plot = cc_se_asv_genera_br, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

*CC - se-asv Genera by HRT*
```{r}
#------------------------------------
# Calculating relative abundance HRT
#------------------------------------
ps_media_CC_rel_df <- ps_media_CC |>
  psmelt() |>
  as_tibble() |>
  filter(!is.na(Genus), Genus != "NA") |>
  group_by(HRT) |>
  mutate(relative_abund = Abundance / sum(Abundance, na.rm = TRUE)) |> 
  ungroup()

# assigning core vs other grouping for phyla coloring
ps_media_CC_rel_df$Genus_ID <- ifelse(ps_media_CC_rel_df$OTU %in% CC_71_se_asvs, as.character(ps_media_CC_rel_df$Genus), "Other") 

# # check
# check_df <- ps_media_CC_rel_df |>
#   filter(OTU %in% CC_71_se_asvs)

# ordering Phyla
unique(ps_media_CC_rel_df$Genus_ID)



# Genus_ID to factor for ordering
ps_media_CC_rel_df$Genus_ID <- factor(ps_media_CC_rel_df$Genus_ID,
                                     levels = names(se_asv_Genus_map))
```
```{r, fig.height=8, fig.width=6}
# plot
cc_se_asv_phyla_br <- ggplot(ps_media_CC_rel_df, aes(x = HRT, y = relative_abund, fill = Genus_ID)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack", color = NA, na.rm = TRUE) +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "CC se-ASV Phyla", values = se_asv_Genus_map) +
  labs(
    x = "HRT", 
    y = "Relative Abundance"
  ) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 15), 
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 15), 
        strip.text = element_text(size = 15), 
        axis.title = element_text(size = 15))

#ggsave("../raw_figs_301/cc_se-asv_phyla_HRT.png", plot = cc_se_asv_phyla_br, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

*WC - se-asv Genera by Bioreactor*
```{r}
ps_media_WC <- subset_samples(ps_media, SampleType == "woodchip")

#---------------------------------------------------
# Calculating relative abundance HRT and Bioreactor
#---------------------------------------------------
ps_media_WC_rel_df <- ps_media_WC |>
  psmelt() |>
  as_tibble() |>
  filter(!is.na(Genus), Genus != "NA") |>
  group_by(Bioreactor, HRT) |>
  mutate(relative_abund = Abundance / sum(Abundance, na.rm = TRUE)) |> 
  ungroup()

# assigning core vs other grouping for phyla coloring
ps_media_WC_rel_df$Genus_ID <- ifelse(ps_media_WC_rel_df$OTU %in% WC_246_se_asvs, as.character(ps_media_WC_rel_df$Genus), "Other") 

# # check
# check_df <- ps_media_WC_rel_df |>
#   filter(OTU %in% WC_246_se_asvs)

# ordering Phyla
unique(ps_media_WC_rel_df$Genus_ID)



# Genus_ID to factor for ordering
ps_media_WC_rel_df$Genus_ID <- factor(ps_media_WC_rel_df$Genus_ID,
                                     levels = names(se_asv_Genus_map))
```
```{r, fig.height=8, fig.width=10}
# plot
WC_se_asv_phyla_br <- ggplot(ps_media_WC_rel_df, aes(x = Bioreactor, y = relative_abund, fill = Genus_ID)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack", color = NA, na.rm = TRUE) +
  theme_bw() +
  facet_wrap(~HRT) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "WC se-ASV Phyla", values = se_asv_Genus_map) +
  labs(
    x = "Bioreactor", 
    y = "Relative Abundance"
  ) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 15), 
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 15), 
        strip.text = element_text(size = 15), 
        axis.title = element_text(size = 15))

#ggsave("../raw_figs_301/WC_se-asv_phyla_BR.png", plot = WC_se_asv_phyla_br, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

*WC - se-asv Genera by HRT*
```{r}
#------------------------------------
# Calculating relative abundance HRT
#------------------------------------
ps_media_WC_rel_df <- ps_media_WC |>
  psmelt() |>
  as_tibble() |>
  filter(!is.na(Genus), Genus != "NA") |>
  group_by(HRT) |>
  mutate(relative_abund = Abundance / sum(Abundance, na.rm = TRUE)) |> 
  ungroup()

# assigning core vs other grouping for phyla coloring
ps_media_WC_rel_df$Genus_ID <- ifelse(ps_media_WC_rel_df$OTU %in% WC_246_se_asvs, as.character(ps_media_WC_rel_df$Genus), "Other") 

# # check
# check_df <- ps_media_WC_rel_df |>
#   filter(OTU %in% WC_246_se_asvs)

# ordering Phyla
unique(ps_media_WC_rel_df$Genus_ID)



# Genus_ID to factor for ordering
ps_media_WC_rel_df$Genus_ID <- factor(ps_media_WC_rel_df$Genus_ID,
                                     levels = names(se_asv_Genus_map))
```
```{r, fig.height=8, fig.width=6}
# plot
WC_se_asv_phyla_br <- ggplot(ps_media_WC_rel_df, aes(x = HRT, y = relative_abund, fill = Genus_ID)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack", color = NA, na.rm = TRUE) +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "WC se-ASV Phyla", values = se_asv_Genus_map) +
  labs(
    x = "HRT", 
    y = "Relative Abundance"
  ) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 15), 
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 15), 
        strip.text = element_text(size = 15), 
        axis.title = element_text(size = 15))

#ggsave("../raw_figs_301/WC_se-asv_phyla_HRT.png", plot = WC_se_asv_phyla_br, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

*CC & WC - all 317 se-asv Phyla by triplicate ID*
```{r, fig.height=10, fig.width=8}
#-------------------------------------------------------------
# Calculating Phyla relative abundance by HRT & Triplicate ID 
#-------------------------------------------------------------
ps_media_rel_df <- ps_media |>
  psmelt() |>
  as_tibble() |>
  filter(!is.na(Phylum), Phylum != "NA")

# making a triplicate column
ps_media_rel_df$triplicate_id <- str_replace(ps_media_rel_df$SampleID, "_\\d+_(\\d+)", "_\\1")

ps_media_rel_df <- ps_media_rel_df |>
  group_by(triplicate_id) |>
  mutate(relative_abund = Abundance / sum(Abundance, na.rm = TRUE)) |> 
  ungroup()

# assigning core vs other grouping <- all 317, not split by media-specific se-ASV
ps_media_rel_df$Phylum_ID <- ifelse(
  ps_media_rel_df$OTU %in% se_asv_317, 
  as.character(ps_media_rel_df$Phylum), 
  "Other"
)

# Phylum ID to factor
unique(ps_media_rel_df$Phylum_ID)

se_asv_phylum_map <- c(
  "Proteobacteria" = "#1F77B4", 
  "Actinobacteriota" = "#2CA02C",
  "Cyanobacteria" = "#9467BD",
  "Euryarchaeota" = "#8C564B",
  "Bacteroidota" = "#393B79",
  "Acidobacteriota" = "#637939",
  "Desulfobacterota" = "#7B4173",
  "Planctomycetota" = "#AD494A",
  "Myxococcota" = "#BEAED4",
  "Verrucomicrobiota" = "#A6CEE3",
  "Firmicutes" = "#B5CF6B",
  "Chloroflexi" = "#E7BA52",
  "Halobacterota" = "#CEDB9C",
  "Thermoplasmatota" = "#CE6DBD",
  "Patescibacteria" = "#1B9E77",
  "Spirochaetota" = "#FF7F0E",
  "Armatimonadota" = "#17BECF",
  "Bdellovibrionota" = "#D62728",
  "Gemmatimonadota" = "#E6AB02",
  "Other" = "#999999"
)

ps_media_rel_df$Phylum_ID <- factor(ps_media_rel_df$Phylum_ID,
                                     levels = names(se_asv_phylum_map))

ggplot(ps_media_rel_df, aes(x = triplicate_id, y = relative_abund, fill = Phylum_ID)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack", color = NA, na.rm = TRUE) +
  theme_bw() +
  facet_wrap(~ SampleType + HRT, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "CC se-ASV Phyla", values = se_asv_phylum_map) +
  labs(
    x = "HRT", 
    y = "Relative Abundance"
  ) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 15), 
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 15),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 15), 
        axis.title = element_text(size = 15))
```

#---------------- HEATMAP ----------------

*CC & WC 317 se-asv Phyla by triplicate ID*
```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=12}
ps_media_rel_df <- ps_media |>
  psmelt() |>
  as_tibble() |>
  filter(!is.na(Phylum), Phylum != "NA")

# making a triplicate column
ps_media_rel_df$triplicate_id <- str_replace(ps_media_rel_df$SampleID, "_\\d+_(\\d+)", "_\\1")

ps_media_rel_df <- ps_media_rel_df |>
  group_by(triplicate_id) |>
  mutate(relative_abund = Abundance / sum(Abundance, na.rm = TRUE)) |> 
  ungroup()

# assigning core vs other grouping <- all 317, not split by media-specific se-ASV
ps_media_rel_df$Phylum_ID <- ifelse(
  ps_media_rel_df$OTU %in% se_asv_317, 
  as.character(ps_media_rel_df$Phylum), 
  "Other"
)

ps_media_heat_df <- ps_media_rel_df |>
  group_by(
    SampleType,
    HRT,
    triplicate_id,
    Phylum_ID
  ) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    rel_abund = sum(relative_abund, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

phyla_factor_order <- c("Proteobacteria", "Actinobacteriota", "Cyanobacteria", "Euryarchaeota", "Bacteroidota", "Acidobacteriota", "Desulfobacterota", "Planctomycetota",
                        "Myxococcota", "Verrucomicrobiota", "Firmicutes", "Chloroflexi", "Halobacterota", "Thermoplasmatota", "Patescibacteria", "Spirochaetota", 
                        "Armatimonadota", "Bdellovibrionota", "Gemmatimonadota", "Other")

ps_media_heat_df$Phylum_ID <- factor(
  ps_media_heat_df$Phylum_ID, 
  levels = rev(phyla_factor_order))

# bin relative abundance for plot
ps_media_heat_df <- ps_media_heat_df %>%
  mutate(
    rel_abund_bin = cut(
      rel_abund,
      breaks = c(0, 0.1, 0.2, 0.4, 0.6, 0.8, 1),
      include.lowest = TRUE,
      right = FALSE,
      labels = c(
        "0–0.1",
        "0.1–0.2",
        "0.2–0.4",
        "0.4–0.6",
        "0.6–0.8",
        "0.8–1"
      )
    )
  )

# bin color map
heatmap_colors <- c(
  "0–0.1"   = "#E0E9FF",
  "0.1–0.2" = "#ADC6FE",
  "0.2–0.4" = "#759FFD",
  "0.4–0.6" = "#2366FC",
  "0.6–0.8" = "#02329D",
  "0.8–1"   = "#011C58"
)

ps_media_heat_df <- ps_media_heat_df %>%
  mutate(
    rel_abund_bin = ifelse(
      rel_abund == 0,
      "0",
      as.character(rel_abund_bin)
    ),
    rel_abund_bin = factor(
      rel_abund_bin,
      levels = c("0", names(heatmap_colors))
    )
  )

heatmap_colors <- c(
  "0"       = "white",
  heatmap_colors
)


# optional: drop "other"
# ps_media_heat_df <- ps_media_heat_df |>
#   filter(Phylum_ID != "Other")

# ordering triplicates
unique(ps_media_heat_df$triplicate_id)

triplicate_order <- c("4CC_0", "4CC_4", "4CC_7","4CC_11", "4CC_14", "4CC_18", "4CC_21",  
                      "CC_6", "CC_10", "CC_15", "CC_20",  
                      "CC_21", "CC_28", "CC_29", "CC_30", "CC_31", "CC_32", "CC_33", "CC_34", "CC_35", "CC_36", "CC_37", "CC_38", 
                      "4WC_0", "4WC_4", "4WC_8", "4WC_11", "4WC_14", "4WC_18", "4WC_21",  
                      "WC_6", "WC_10", "WC_15", "WC_20", 
                      "WC_21", "WC_24", "WC_27", "WC_28", "WC_29", "WC_30", "WC_31")

ps_media_heat_df$triplicate_id <- factor(ps_media_heat_df$triplicate_id, levels = triplicate_order)

new_phyla_taxa_names <- c(
  "Proteobacteria" = "Pseudomonadota", 
  "Actinobacteriota" = "Actinomycetota",
  "Cyanobacteria" = "Cyanobacteria",
  "Euryarchaeota" = "Euryarchaeota",
  "Bacteroidota" = "Bacteroidota",
  "Acidobacteriota" = "Acidobacteriota",
  "Desulfobacterota" = "Desulfobacterota",
  "Planctomycetota" = "Planctomycetota",
  "Myxococcota" = "Myxococcota",
  "Verrucomicrobiota" = "Verrucomicrobiota",
  "Firmicutes" = "Bacillota",
  "Chloroflexi" = "Chloroflexota",
  "Halobacterota" = "Halobacterota",
  "Thermoplasmatota" = "Thermoplasmatota",
  "Patescibacteria" = "Patescibacteria",
  "Spirochaetota" = "Spirochaetota",
  "Armatimonadota" = "Armatimonadota",
  "Bdellovibrionota" = "Bdellovibrionota",
  "Gemmatimonadota" = "Gemmatimonadota",
  "Other" = "Other"
)

# plot
# ggplot(
#   ps_media_heat_df,
#   aes(
#     x = triplicate_id,
#     y = Phylum_ID,
#     fill = rel_abund
#   )
# ) +
#   geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
#   facet_wrap(~ SampleType + HRT, scales = "free_x", nrow = 1) +
#   scale_fill_gradient(
#     name = "Relative abundance",
#     low = "white",
#     high = "#1F77B4"
#   ) +
#   labs(
#     x = "Triplicate",
#     y = "Phylum"
#   ) +
#   theme_bw() +
#   theme(
#     panel.grid = element_blank(),
#     axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1),
#     axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
#     strip.text = element_text(size = 14),
#     axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
#     legend.title = element_text(size = 13),
#     legend.text = element_text(size = 11)
#   )

phyla_heatmap <- ggplot(
  ps_media_heat_df,
  aes(
    x = triplicate_id,
    y = Phylum_ID,
    fill = rel_abund_bin
  )
) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ SampleType + HRT, scales = "free_x", nrow = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Relative abundance",
    values = heatmap_colors,
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_y_discrete(labels = new_phyla_taxa_names) +
  labs(
    x = "Triplicate",
    y = "Phylum"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11)
  )

#ggsave("../raw_figs_301/phyla_317_heatmap.png", plot = phyla_heatmap, width = 14, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 300)

# numeric means - Phyla relative abundance by sample type & HRT
ps_media_phyla_means <- ps_media_heat_df |>
  group_by(SampleType, HRT, Phylum_ID) |>
  summarise(mean_rel = mean(rel_abund, na.rm = TRUE),
            mean_rel_std = sd(rel_abund, na.rm = TRUE))
```

*CC & WC 317 se-asv Genera by triplicate ID*
```{r, fig.height=8, fig.width=12}
ps_media_rel_df <- ps_media |>
  psmelt() |>
  as_tibble() |>
  filter(!is.na(Genus), Genus != "NA")

# making a triplicate column
ps_media_rel_df$triplicate_id <- str_replace(ps_media_rel_df$SampleID, "_\\d+_(\\d+)", "_\\1")

ps_media_rel_df <- ps_media_rel_df |>
  group_by(triplicate_id) |>
  dplyr::mutate(relative_abund = Abundance / sum(Abundance, na.rm = TRUE)) |> 
  ungroup()

# assigning core vs other grouping <- all 317, not split by media-specific se-ASV
ps_media_rel_df$Genus_ID <- ifelse(
  ps_media_rel_df$OTU %in% se_asv_317, 
  as.character(ps_media_rel_df$Genus), 
  "Other"
)

ps_media_heat_df <- ps_media_rel_df |>
  group_by(
    SampleType,
    HRT,
    triplicate_id,
    Genus_ID
  ) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    rel_abund = sum(relative_abund, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# bin relative abundance for plot
ps_media_heat_df <- ps_media_heat_df %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    rel_abund_bin = cut(
      rel_abund,
      breaks = c(0, 0.1, 0.2, 0.4, 0.6),
      include.lowest = TRUE,
      right = FALSE,
      labels = c(
        "0–0.1",
        "0.1–0.2",
        "0.2–0.4",
        "0.4–0.6"
      )
    )
  )

# bin color map
heatmap_colors <- c(
  "0–0.1"   = "#E0E9FF",
  "0.1–0.2" = "#ADC6FE",
  "0.2–0.4" = "#759FFD",
  "0.4–0.6" = "#2366FC"
)

ps_media_heat_df <- ps_media_heat_df %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    rel_abund_bin = ifelse(
      rel_abund == 0,
      "0",
      as.character(rel_abund_bin)
    ),
    rel_abund_bin = factor(
      rel_abund_bin,
      levels = c("0", names(heatmap_colors))
    )
  )

heatmap_colors <- c(
  "0"       = "white",
  heatmap_colors
)


# optional: drop "other"
# ps_media_heat_df <- ps_media_heat_df |>
#   filter(Genus_ID != "Other")

# order genera top → bottom (reverse for heatmap aesthetics)

se_asv_genus_map <- c(
  "Xanthobacter", "Pseudorhodoplanes", "Azotobacter", "Burkholderia-Caballeronia-Paraburkholderia", "Cellulomonas", "Azospira", "Zoogloea", "Pseudomonas", "Plot4-2H12", 
  "Methanobacterium", "Mycobacterium", "Bradyrhizobium", "Nevskia", "Sphingomonas", "Geothrix", "Desulfovibrio", "Mesorhizobium", "Rhizomicrobium", "Caulobacter", 
  "Pleomorphomonas", "Coxiella", "Sediminibacterium", "Pajaroellobacter", "Undibacterium", "Edaphobaculum", "Pseudolabrys", "Kaistia", "Hyphomicrobium", "Rudaea", "Devosia", 
  "Aetherobacter", "Prosthecobacter", "Beijerinckia", "Puia", "Novosphingobium", "Dyella", "LD29", "Anaerolineaceae UCG-001", "Bacteroides", "Papillibacter", "Sphingobium", 
  "Gluconacetobacter", "Tahibacter", "Gemmata", "Rhodopila", "Ferruginibacter", "Thermincola", "WCHB1-32", "Limnohabitans",
  
  "Telmatospirillum", "Afipia", "Cytophaga", "Methylophilus", "Taibaiella", 
  "Methanocella", "Pir2 lineage", "Ellin516", "Bryobacter", 
  "Methanomassiliicoccus", "Methylocystis", "Bacillus", "Cupriavidus", 
  "Methanosarcina", "Chitinophaga", "Altererythrobacter", "Leptolinea", 
  "Terrimicrobium", "SN8", "Heliimonas", "Aquisphaera", "Paludisphaera", 
  "Fimbriiglobus", "Microvirgula", "Opitutus", "Chthoniobacter", 
  "Aquicella", "Ruminiclostridium", "Pseudoxanthobacter", "Terrimonas", 
  "Anaerospora", "Fibrisoma", "Thiobacillus", "Curvibacter", 
  "Pedomicrobium", "Solimonas", "Magnetospirillum", "Aminobacter", 
  "Desulfosporosinus", "Streptomyces", "Parachlamydia", 
  "Clostridium sensu stricto 1", "SM1A02", "NK4A214 group", "Ellin6055", 
  "Incertae Sedis", "Sphingoaurantiacus", "Singulisphaera", "Haliangium", 
  "Christensenellaceae R-7 group", "SH3-11", "Anaeromyxobacter", 
  "Allorhizobium-Neorhizobium-Pararhizobium-Rhizobium", "Rhodoplanes", 
  "Clostridium sensu stricto 12", "Labrys", "Azospirillum", "Inquilinus", 
  "Steroidobacter", "Gordonia", "Thermomonas", "Nordella", "Rhodovastum", 
  "Psychrobacter", "Mucilaginibacter", "Galbitalea", "Methanospirillum", 
  "Acidibacter", "Sporobacter", "Williamsia", "Lacunisphaera", 
  "Defluviitaleaceae UCG-011", "Reyranella", "Bdellovibrio", "Anaerolinea", 
  "Spirosoma", "Gemmatimonas", "Methylobacterium-Methylorubrum", 
  "Sporomusa", "Brevundimonas", "Tundrisphaera", "Pseudobacteroides", 
  "Spirochaeta 2",
  
  "Other"
)

ps_media_heat_df$Genus_ID <- factor(
  ps_media_heat_df$Genus_ID,
  levels = rev(se_asv_genus_map))


# ordering triplicates
unique(ps_media_heat_df$triplicate_id)

triplicate_order <- c("4CC_0", "4CC_4", "4CC_7","4CC_11", "4CC_14", "4CC_18", "4CC_21",  
                      "CC_6", "CC_10", "CC_15", "CC_20",  
                      "CC_21", "CC_28", "CC_29", "CC_30", "CC_31", "CC_32", "CC_33", "CC_34", "CC_35", "CC_36", "CC_37", "CC_38", 
                      "4WC_0", "4WC_4", "4WC_8", "4WC_11", "4WC_14", "4WC_18", "4WC_21",  
                      "WC_6", "WC_10", "WC_15", "WC_20", 
                      "WC_21", "WC_24", "WC_27", "WC_28", "WC_29", "WC_30", "WC_31")

ps_media_heat_df$triplicate_id <- factor(ps_media_heat_df$triplicate_id, levels = triplicate_order)

genera_heatmap <- ggplot(
  ps_media_heat_df,
  aes(
    x = triplicate_id,
    y = Genus_ID,
    fill = rel_abund_bin
  )
) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ SampleType + HRT, scales = "free_x", nrow = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Relative abundance",
    values = heatmap_colors,
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Triplicate",
    y = "Genus"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1, size = 10),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11)
  )

#ggsave("../raw_figs_301/genera_317_heatmap.png", plot = genera_heatmap, width = 20, height = 13, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```
